content: Select the {{organizationName}} Workspace backup file to start the data import. Once the data upload and analysis are complete, the next step will be initiated automatically.

comment.text: This translation key is used to provide a description for a user interface element that prompts users to select an OnlyOffice Workspace backup file. The description appears in a UI dialog and explains the next step in the data import process after successful upload and analysis.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Arabic translation contains a grammatical error in the possessive construction (Idafa) that makes the sentence sound broken/unnatural: 'ملف النسخ الاحتياطي مساحة عمل' should be 'ملف النسخ الاحتياطي لمساحة عمل' to correctly link 'backup file' to 'workspace'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: حدد ملف النسخ الاحتياطي لمساحة عمل {{organizationName}} لبدء استيراد البيانات. بمجرد اكتمال تحميل البيانات وتحليلها، ستبدأ الخطوة التالية تلقائيا.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Finnish translation includes an extra sentence 'Vain yksi tiedosto voidaan valita.' (Only one file can be selected) which is not present in the English source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Valitse {{organizationName}} Workspace-varmuuskopiotiedosto aloittaaksesi tietojen tuonnin. Kun tietojen lataus ja analysointi on valmis, seuraava vaihe aloitetaan automaattisesti.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in number agreement: 'les fichier' should be 'le fichier' (singular) or 'les fichiers' (plural). Given the English 'the... file' is singular, it should be 'le fichier'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sélectionnez le fichier de sauvegarde d'{{organizationName}} Workspace pour lancer l'importation. Une fois le téléchargement et l'analyse de données terminés, l'étape suivante est lancée automatiquement.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text uses the singular 'file', while the Romanian translation uses the plural 'fișierele' (files). This changes the instruction from selecting one specific file to selecting multiple files.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Selectați fișierul de rezervă {{organizationName}} Workspace pentru a demara importul de date. Odată ce încărcarea și analiza datelor sunt finalizate, următoarea etapă va fi inițiată automat.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Ukrainian translation adds information not present in the English source ('Можна вибрати декілька файлів.' / 'You can select multiple files.'), which may lead to UI inconsistency if the component only supports single file selection.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Виберіть файл резервної копії {{organizationName}} Workspace, щоб почати імпорт даних. Після завершення завантаження й аналізу даних наступний крок буде розпочато автоматично.
